subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, my Best-Beloved! I render thanks unto Thee for the wondrous bounties of Thy oneness which Thou hast caused to flow forth and sent down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا محبوبی اشکرک فی بدایع نعماء احدیتک فیما اجریتها و انزلتها
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @presence of; reunion with God
